description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an archive Peacock game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Final, <away_team>, <away_team_score>, <home_team>, <home_team_score>, Watch Now, press select to play, press up for the Main Menu, press down to browse more content."
